reason: Enabling FIPS mode requires a kernel boot flag that is not supported on a running system; attempting to remediate on an installed system is a permanent finding and can break cryptographic operations, potentially locking out authentication and authorization services.
estimated_impact: reboot required; authentication/authorization affected; Potential loss of SSH/console access due to cryptographic incompatibilities; System may become unusable if FIPS mode is forced on a non‑FIPS kernel; Requires full system reinstall or container rebuild
